allow: PowerShell(Start-Sleep -Seconds 12; Add-Type -AssemblyName System.Windows.Forms; Add-Type -AssemblyName System.Drawing; $screen = [System.Windows.Forms.Screen]::PrimaryScreen.Bounds; $bmp = New-Object System.Drawing.Bitmap\($screen.Width, $screen.Height\); $g = [System.Drawing.Graphics]::FromImage\($bmp\); $g.CopyFromScreen\($screen.Location, [System.Drawing.Point]::Empty, $screen.Size\); $path = "C:\\Users\\Stefano\\AppData\\Local\\Temp\\claude\\screenshot_app.png"; $bmp.Save\($path\); $g.Dispose\(\); $bmp.Dispose\(\); Write-Output "Screenshot saved to $path")
